headline: Top S&P500 movers in Wednesday's session
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Wednesday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Three Oil Stocks Circle Buy Points With Crude Prices High
summary: Valero Energy and two other refiners topped buy points this week amid high crude oil prices, before slipping somewhat on Wednesday.

headline: 4 Low-Beta Stocks for a Steadier Portfolio: LQDA, XOM, VLO & FANG
summary: Middle East tensions are stoking volatility; a low-beta screen spotlights Liquidia, Exxon Mobil, Valero Energy and Diamondback Energy.

headline: Is Trump Letting The Strait Of Hormuz Stay Closed? US Refiners Aren't Complaining
summary: US refined product exports hit a record 7.92 million b/d in the four weeks ending May 8, with refinery utilization at multi-year highs and inventories at five-year lows. The Trump administration is in no rush to reopen Hormuz.

raw.headline: Is Trump Letting The Strait Of Hormuz Stay Closed? US Refiners Aren't Complaining
